* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: b: * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; } body { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; min-height: 100vh; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #1a2b3c; /* fallback color */ background-image: url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1548624313-0396c75e4b1a?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=1950&q=80'); /* peaceful church interior */ background-size: cover; background-position: center 30%; background-repeat: no-repeat; position: relative; } /* soft overlay for readability */ body::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4); backdrop-filter: blur(2px); z-index: 0; } .auth { position: relative; z-index: 1; width: 100%; max-width: 440px; padding: 1.5rem; } .auth-card { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px); border-radius: 32px; padding: 2.5rem 2rem; box-shadow: 0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); transition: transform 0.3s ease; } .auth-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); } /* subtle cross decoration */ .auth-card::before { content: '✝'; font-size: 3rem; color: rgba(200, 160, 110, 0.15); position: absolute; bottom: 10px; right: 20px; font-family: serif; pointer-events: none; } h1 { font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 600; color: #2c3e50; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; letter-spacing: -0.5px; } .muted { color: #5a6b7a; margin-bottom: 2rem; font-weight: 400; font-size: 1rem; border-left: 4px solid #c9a77d; padding-left: 1rem; } .form-grid label { display: block; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; font-weight: 500; color: #2c3e50; } .form-grid label span { display: block; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; font-size: 0.9rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; color: #4a5a6a; } .form-grid input { width: 100%; padding: 0.9rem 1.2rem; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border-radius: 60px; /* pill shape */ font-size: 1rem; background: white; transition: all 0.2s; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -4px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); } .form-grid input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #c9a77d; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(201, 167, 125, 0.3); } .btn { width: 100%; padding: 1rem; background: #2c3e50; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 60px; font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.1s; margin-top: 0.5rem; box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -5px rgba(44, 62, 80, 0.4); letter-spacing: 0.5px; } .btn:hover { background: #1e2b37; } .btn:active { transform: scale(0.98); } /* error styling */ .errorlist { list-style: none; color: #b34a4a; font-size: 0.9rem; margin: 0.5rem 0 0; padding: 0; } /* small footer link (optional) */ .auth-footer { text-align: center; margin-top: 1.8rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); font-size: 0.9rem; } .auth-footer a { color: white; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; border-bottom: 1px dotted rgba(255,255,255,0.5); } .auth-footer a:hover { border-bottom-color: white; } /* responsive adjustments */ @media (max-width: 480px) { .auth-card { padding: 2rem 1.5rem; } h1 { font-size: 1.8rem; } }
.lang-sw { display:flex; gap:4px; } .lan: .lang-sw { display:flex; gap:4px; } .lang-btn { background:transparent; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.3); color:rgba(255,255,255,.7); border-radius:6px; padding:4px 8px; font-size:.72rem; font-weight:600; cursor:pointer; transition:all .2s; } .lang-btn:hover, .lang-btn.active { background:rgba(255,255,255,.2); color:#fff; border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.6); }
